rules.description: Corporate agreements must identify all parties with registered names, CIN/LLPIN, and registered addresses.
rules.statutory_reference: Companies Act 2013 – S.2(20); LLP Act 2008 – S.2

rules.description: Corporate agreements must specify Indian governing law and jurisdiction.
rules.statutory_reference: Companies Act 2013 – S.6; Indian Contract Act 1872 – S.23

rules.description: Corporate agreements should specify dispute resolution mechanism.
